# Akeyless Vaultless Platform Documentation

## API Reference
- [Create a new custom field.](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/accountcustomfieldcreate.md)
- [Delete a custom field.](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/accountcustomfielddelete.md)
- [Get an account custom field by ID.](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/accountcustomfieldget.md)
- [List all account custom fields.](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/accountcustomfieldlist.md): Returns a list of all custom fields configured for the account, optionally filtered by object and object type.
- [Update a custom field.](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/accountcustomfieldupdate.md)
- [/alias-details](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/aliasdetails.md)
- [/assoc-role-am](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/assoc-role-am.md)
- [/assoc-target-item](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/assoctargetitem.md)
- [/auth](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/auth.md)
- [/auth-method-create-api-key](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/authmethodcreateapikey.md)
- [/auth-method-create-aws-iam](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/authmethodcreateawsiam.md)
- [/auth-method-create-azure-ad](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/authmethodcreateazuread.md)
- [/auth-method-create-cert](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/authmethodcreatecert.md)
